description: Cursor YOLO v5 — P1–P3 parallell audit, P4–P13 sekventiell polish/deploy. 2026-07-13.

sequentialPhase.label: Steg 2–5 — en uppgift i taget efter gate PASS

tasks.title: YOLO-vakt audit (read-only)

tasks.title: UX Guardian audit (read-only)
tasks.plan: Read-only Locked UX audit. smoke:locked-ux + smoke:design-modules. Spara docs/evaluations/2026-07-13-ux-guardian.md.

tasks.title: Design-debt baseline
tasks.plan: npm run smoke:design-debt → uppdatera docs/DASHBOARD.md. smoke:governance. Inga produktändringar.

tasks.title: Calm-card polish (Premium UI Phase 1)
tasks.plan: smoke:calm-card-audit findings en i taget. DS tokens enligt design-calm. Inte AppRoutes (MOD-CORE-NAV låst).

tasks.title: Ad-hoc dialoger → DS Modal
tasks.plan: Sandbox först: W1ProjektNyPickerPreview, FreeportResurserOverlay. ResurserOverlay endast om locked-ux PASS.

tasks.title: A11y polish Vardagen
tasks.plan: aria-label, focus-visible, prefers-reduced-motion, 44px touch i dailyLife/**.

tasks.title: Copy audit fixes
tasks.plan: smoke:copy-audit PASS. Flytta strängar till src/modules/core/copy/.

tasks.title: A11y polish Hjärtat
tasks.plan: lifeJournal/** — samma a11y-regler. Rör inte Valv PIN/WORM.

tasks.title: Bundle perf (delegate-level lazy)
tasks.plan: Dynamic import i superhub delegates — INTE AppRoutes.tsx (MOD-CORE-NAV låst).

tasks.title: Android G85 prod-sync
tasks.plan: build:web, cap:sync:prod, smoke:android-platform, smoke:android-prod-sync. Logga g85-sync eval.

tasks.title: G17 Zero Footprint blur
tasks.plan: Blur/clear vid tab-byte. USER smoke kvar för Pontus. Inga rules.

tasks.title: Kunskap våg 8 dry-run
tasks.plan: Dry-run ingest only. smoke:innehall. Ingen live utan Pontus KEEP.

tasks.title: Hosting deploy (sist)
tasks.plan: yolo-vakt GO → smoke:predeploy:build → Pontus OK → firebase deploy --only hosting.
